summary: Creates a line between two points with configurable number of divisions. Useful as a curve primitive for sweeps, instancing paths, and wire-frame effects.

key_params.name: points
key_params.note: Number of points along the line (more points = smoother curves when deformed)

key_params.name: direction
key_params.note: Direction axis for the line: X, Y, or Z

common_gotchas: A line with only 2 points cannot be smoothly deformed — increase points for curve-like operations.
Lines are not renderable by default in most materials; use a Wire MAT or convert to tubes.
